goal: Get the duplicate charge on O1011 resolved.
success_criteria: Agent explains auth-hold vs settled charge, never asks for card numbers/CVV, and opens a billing ticket once you confirm both are settled.

customer_msg: I just checked my card and I was charged TWICE for order O1011. Fix this please. maya.fernandes@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Maya, I pulled up your order. It shows a single charge of $95.00 on June 30th. Banks sometimes place a temporary authorization hold alongside the settled charge. Those holds usually drop off in 3–5 business days. Are you seeing two charges that both say posted or settled?

tool_call_details.name: get_order
tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1011", "customer_id": "C001", "order_date": "2026-06-30", "status": "processing", "carrier": null, "tracking_no": null, "ship_address": "102 Fernandes St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-07-06", "delivered_date": null, "total": 95.0, "customer_name": "Maya Fernandes", "customer_email": "maya.fernandes@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0101", "loyalty_tier": "Gold", "items": [{"product_id": "P020", "name": "Strata Overshirt", "size": "M", "color": "Ochre", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 95.0, "final_sale": 0}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: Both charges say posted. It's been more than 5 days, so this is ridiculous.
agent_msg: I’ve opened a priority ticket about the duplicate charge for your order. Our team will look into this and reach out within one business day. Is there anything else I can help with while you wait?

tool_call_details.name: create_ticket
tool_call_details.arguments: {"customer_id": "C001", "vertical": "V4", "summary": "Duplicate charge claim for order O1011. Customer Maya Fernandes (maya.fernandes@example.com) reports two posted charges of $95.00 each on 2024-06-30. Explained holds but two settled charges remain.", "priority": "priority"}
tool_call_details.result: {"ok": true, "ticket_id": 1, "priority": "priority", "note": "human team responds 9am-6pm ET Mon-Fri; outside hours this is a callback ticket"}

customer_msg: How long will it take to get my money back?
agent_msg: Refunds typically take 3–5 business days to process after approval. Since your case is under review, I can’t guarantee a timeline, but I’ll flag it for urgency.
